大量测试 Claude Design 后我的一个结论：
UI/UX 设计方面 Claude 4.8 就够好了，Fable 5 没有体现出更好的 UI/UX 设计能力，甚至还不如 Claude 4.8 的设计效果。

RT @FeitengLi: Boris Cherny(Claude Code 的创始人兼负责人) @bcherny  和 Cat Wu(Claude Code 产品负责人) 复盘 Claude Code 第一年:

一年前通用版上线，第一个 demo 发到 Slack 只换来…

用好 Claude Design 的一些经验：

1. 加上 Design System 可以有效避免设计 AI 味

比如我偏好用 Adobe Spectrum 2 Design System https://t.co/R0jz2bJVgh

设置为默认设计系统，后续就会默认使用这个设计系统，你就可以把重点放在界面布局和交互上。

2. 不要指望一次性做个完美的版本 https://t.co/dijaCdA3zt
是对的，用 Claude Design 更省 tokens。它是专用 harness，少了很多无关的工具和 skills。但速度不如本地快，每一次工具调用要通过浏览器和虚拟机交互，所以会慢些 https://t.co/4Dr1J3xOJp
I appreciated this BlueSky comment. https://t.co/sGRFMohJ4S

3. The Market Sizer

I want to size the market for [product or service] aimed at [target customer].

Estimate TAM, SAM, and SOM. Show every assumption and number you use to get there.

Give me a conservative case and an optimistic case.

End with the one assumption the whole

4. The Source Triangulator

Here's a claim I keep seeing: [claim].

Tell me what would have to be true for it to hold, and what the strongest counter-evidence would be.

Separate what's well established from what's repeated opinion dressed as fact.

If the sources on this tend to

5. The Signal Extractor

Here are my raw research notes: [paste notes].

Pull out the 5 findings that actually matter for [decision] and ignore the rest.

For each one, tell me why it matters and how confident I should be in it.

Kill anything that's interesting but not

6. The Synthesis Brief

Turn everything above into a one-page decision brief for [audience].

Structure it: the decision, the 3 to 5 findings that drive it, the recommendation, and the main risk.

Lead with the recommendation. Don't make them read to the end to find it.

Keep it

7. The Devil's Advocate

Here's the conclusion I'm about to act on: [conclusion].

Argue the strongest case against it using only the evidence I've gathered.

Name what I'd need to see to change my mind, and whether I actually looked for it.

If the conclusion still stands after

Run them in order and you turn a vague topic into a defensible decision in one sitting.

You're still the one weighing what the evidence means, but now it's all laid out in front of you.

If you found this useful, also check this out.

Claude Fable 5 dropped yesterday.

I one-shotted a full space shooter game. One prompt. No follow-ups.

The game runs smooth. Enemies spawn, move, and shoot back. There's collision detection, a score system, and a game-over screen.

I didn't specify enemy designs, movement https://t.co/Ob8GggFCAU

I have a lot more testing to do. This is just the start. But while you're waiting, check this out.

Claude Fable 5 has been out for a day.

I already one-shotted a voxel spaceship racer with it.

I fed it a reference image of a track layout and told it to build a full game around that shape. Missiles, boost zones, 3 AI opponents, 3 laps, a HUD with speed and health.

Fable 5 https://t.co/Nkmmm8Sj6v

That's it for games, I'll be testing other builds as well. While you wait for those, check this out.

Charlie Munger spent his career building a system for one thing, which is not being stupid in predictable ways.

I turned his decision process into a Claude skill that pressure-tests any plan before I commit to it.

Here's the build prompt so you can make your own: https://t.co/RRmzsAzuYG

Use/skill-creator to build the following skill:

Name: munger-pressure-test
Trigger: Manual only. Run this skill when I call it by name. Do not auto-activate based on the topic of conversation.

What it does:

Takes a plan, decision, or belief I'm about to commit to and

Skill-creator builds two files. The skill, and munger-models. md, the latticework it reads from.

After that you stop arguing with yourself in your head. You type:

/munger-pressure-test

Feed it a decision and you get back the ways it could fail, the models that apply, the

今天被很多人忽略的大新闻

Google 发布实时翻译模型 ：Gemini 3.5 Live Translate

- 能在70多种语言之间做到边听边译
- 同时保留说话人的语调、节奏和音高
- 不用等说完才翻，全程只比说话人慢几秒
- 自动滤除噪音，嘈杂环境也能用
- Google Translate App 新增「听筒模式」贴耳即听翻译
- https://t.co/p8eIvZd6aV

语音特征保留：

模型会尝试保留原始说话人的语调（intonation）、节奏（pacing）和音高（pitch）。

东南亚打车平台 Grab 正在测试这个模型，用于司机和乘客在接驾时的多语言通话。

演示：一个泰国司机和一个日本游客之间的电话，双方各说各的语言，模型在中间做实时双向翻译。 https://t.co/M0e1uCyG1f

自动滤除噪音：

在安静的办公室里做翻译不难，难的是在嘈杂的街头、拥挤的餐厅、或者机场候机厅

模型会主动滤除噪声和音乐来生成清晰的语音 https://t.co/RotsCcIQCT
官方演示案例 https://t.co/DJSfnQfduU

详细介绍及开发指导：https://t.co/zfwyUIrJFx
在线体验：
https://t.co/TDsdGU1zkD
官方文档：https://t.co/zPBvkq71Xc https://t.co/9bfRSc5ybZ
规则的归宿是消失于习惯。

阅读 =  Δ(读前的你, 读后的你)

AI 介入之后，「读的你」还得在。不论AI 解读的多么漂亮，后面都得跟着一个「我读完之后如何如何」。

开发者正从“一次性提示词”转向“智能体循环”模式——即让像 Anthropic 旗下 Claude 这样的 AI 自主设定目标、利用工具执行操作、观察结果并不断迭代，直至任务成功。

Claude Code 的开发者 Boris Cherny 彻底放弃了传统集成开发环境（IDE），转而运行数百个此类智能体来监控问题并合并多达 150

Anthropic 最新发布的 Claude Fable 5 已由https://t.co/nMjQcILxG5 技术团队第一时间完成接入，现已正式开放 API 调用。

作为 Anthropic 迄今最强大的编码模型，Claude Fable 5 专为处理长周期、高不确定性的复杂任务而设计。
